text.title: DDD ACL Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping integration shape to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the external system's model materially differ from the domain (field names / semantics / error shapes)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: direct SDK call is fine; document the choice
lightweight adapter without contract tests; revisit if it survives 6 months

branch.question: Is the integration on a critical path (revenue, compliance)?

conclusion.verdict: full ACL: domain interface + adapter + error translation + documented fail-safe + contract tests + runbook
adapter + error translation; fail-safe may be lax but must be documented

text.example: gap=material → durable=true → critical=true → full ACL with documented "assume-available + retry" fail-safe; contract test pins JSON shape.
